Title: User successfully logs into the Admin system
Preconditions: User has a valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "user123" as the username.
2. User enters "pass123" as the password.
3. User clicks on the login button.
4. System verifies the credentials.
5. System displays a success message.
Expected Result: User is logged into the Admin system.

Title: User fails to log into the Admin system due to invalid credentials
Preconditions: User has an invalid username or password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "wronguser" as the username.
2. User enters "wrongpass" as the password.
3. User clicks on the login button.
4. System verifies the credentials.
5. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: User is not logged into the Admin system and receives an error message.

Title: Admin successfully adds a product to the system
Test Data:
- Product name: "Laptop"
- Product description: "High-performance laptop with 16GB RAM"
Test Steps:
1. Admin logs in.
2. Admin clicks on the "Add Product" button.
3. Admin enters "Laptop" as the product name.
4. Admin enters "High-performance laptop with 16GB RAM" as the product description.
5. Admin clicks on the "Save" button.
6. System saves the product.
7. System displays a success message.
Expected Result: Product is added to the system.

Title: Admin fails to add a product due to missing required fields
Test Data:
- Product name: ""
- Product description: "High-performance laptop with 16GB RAM"
Test Steps:
1. Admin logs in.
2. Admin clicks on the "Add Product" button.
3. Admin leaves the product name field empty.
4. Admin enters "High-performance laptop with 16GB RAM" as the product description.
5. Admin clicks on the "Save" button.
6. System checks the input fields.
7. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: Product is not added to the system and an error message is displayed.

Title: User successfully adds an item to their cart
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User clicks on the "Add Item" button.
3. User selects "Mouse" as the item name.
4. User enters "29.99" as the item price.
5. User clicks on the "Add" button.
6. System adds the item to the cart.
7. System displays a success message.
Expected Result: Item is added to the user's cart.

Title: User fails to add an item to their cart due to invalid price
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User clicks on the "Add Item" button.
3. User selects "Keyboard" as the item name.
4. User enters "-10.00" as the item price.
5. User clicks on the "Add" button.
6. System checks the item price.
7. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: Item is not added to the user's cart and an error message is displayed.

Title: User successfully removes an item from their cart
Preconditions: User is logged in and has an item in their cart.
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User clicks on the "Remove Item" button.
3. User selects "Mouse" as the item name.
4. User clicks on the "Remove" button.
5. System removes the item from the cart.
6. System displays a success message.
Expected Result: Item is removed from the user's cart.

Title: User fails to remove an item from their cart due to non-existent item
Preconditions: User is logged in and does not have the specified item in their cart.
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User clicks on the "Remove Item" button.
3. User selects "Mouse" as the item name.
4. User clicks on the "Remove" button.
5. System checks if the item exists in the cart.
6. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: Item is not removed from the user's cart and an error message is displayed.

Title: User successfully logs out of the Admin system
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User clicks on the "Logout" button.
3. System logs the user out.
4. System displays a success message.
Expected Result: User is logged out of the Admin system.

Title: User fails to log out due to unexpected system failure
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User clicks on the "Logout" button.
3. System attempts to log the user out but encounters an error.
4. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: User remains logged in and an error message is displayed.
